title: Fixture-mode export + atlas coherence CLI pipeline e2e
problem: Ticket-291 proved live_network CLI pipeline chaining. Default pytest should also prove export-atlas-snapshot → atlas-coherence-report on a fixture-mode MVP DB without network (CI-parity operator spine).
acceptance_criteria: Network-free pytest builds fixture-mode MVP DB, runs export-atlas-snapshot CLI then atlas-coherence-report CLI.
Asserts overall_coherence_verdict pass/partial and report JSON population thresholds.
Golden + full pytest green; no public export/site/schema changes.
non_goals: Public atlas route or site UI.
rollback_plan: Remove fixture pipeline test module only.
category: Phase 3 / Research Atlas / operator pipeline validation
